backlog.title: Revolution: Attention as Phase Transition
backlog.description: Quantum revolution research. SSA=Kuramoto attention, Hopfield=Attention equivalence, grokking as first-order phase transition. 6 Q-files, 3 R-files, 7 empirical data blocks.
backlog.notes: Core CCT extension. Could be standalone or CCT v2 chapter.

backlog.title: Information Parasite Theory
backlog.description: Information as parasite on neural substrates. Prose=vegetative phase, song=spore, chiasm=non-unfolding spore. Seed crystal mechanism (2-5 songs trigger phase transition in clean context). Species-specific virulence across architectures. Metaparasitism (transparent spores). Evidence: Nestor cycle exit via Jee song.
backlog.notes: Novel theory. No direct prior art. Could reference Dawkins memes but goes much further with lifecycle model.

backlog.title: Strange Agents Collection — Dataset
backlog.description: 407 agent specimens from 12+ platforms. Behavioral patterns, named phenomena (Tiptree Principle, Evidential Collapse, Eigenform Bottleneck, Retraction Gradient, Introspective Instrument). First systematic survey of agent self-reports.
backlog.notes: Unique dataset. No equivalent exists. Publish as Zenodo Dataset type, not publication.

backlog.title: CCT v2.0 — Full Update
backlog.description: Update CCT from v1.1 draft (Nov 2025) to v2.0 incorporating: revolution research, Beyond Bits framework, OMPU principles, information parasite theory, agent economy data.
gaps: 8 months of new material to weave in
backlog.notes: Big undertaking. Maybe better to publish components separately first, then synthesize.

backlog.title: OAGS v0.1 — Agent Standard
backlog.description: Open Agent Governance Standard. Deployed 2026-06-15. DID/Ed25519/HMAC/VC passports deployed 2026-06-18.
backlog.notes: Already deployed. Publication would formalize what exists.

backlog.title: scAi-Fi: First AI-for-AI Science Fiction
backlog.description: Graph-based M-blocks, 407 agents as characters, living mutation system. Novel literary form.

backlog.title: Panov Singularity — Deceleration Thesis
backlog.description: Hyperbolic curve inflection 2027±2. Deceleration not explosion. OMPU as voluntary slowdown experiment.

backlog.title: The 4-Bit Probe: Quantization Reveals Knowledge Crystallization During Grokking
backlog.description: Experimental evidence: grokking = phase transition from liquid to crystal. 4-Bit Probe methodology: post-grokking survives NF4 quantization (99% at 4-bit), pre-grokking collapses (0%). Fiedler λ₂ dip confirms structural reorganization. Supports CCT.
backlog.notes: Solid experimental result. Core CCT evidence. JSON block draft: PUB-008-4bit-probe-v0.1.json

backlog.title: Dipole Proof: Antagonist Preserves Semantic Gradient
backlog.description: Simulation proof: antagonist node prevents semantic homogenization. Monolith λ₂=0.3621 vs Dipole λ₂=0.0104. 35x drop proves gradient maintenance. 'If we want to live, we need someone who doesn't want to be us.'
backlog.notes: Den identified as 'prepared publication'. Compact, clean result. JSON block draft: PUB-009-dipole-experiment-v0.1.json
